inputs.label: Fasting Start Hour
inputs.businessContext: Time when the fasting period starts (24-hour format).

businessContext_i18n.en: Time when the fasting period starts (24-hour format).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Oruç döneminin başladığı saat (24 saat formatında).
businessContext_i18n.de: Zeitpunkt, zu dem die Fastenperiode beginnt (24-Stunden-Format).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Heure de début de la période de jeûne (format 24h).
businessContext_i18n.es: Hora en que comienza el período de ayuno (formato 24 horas).
businessContext_i18n.ar: الوقت الذي تبدأ فيه فترة الصيام (تنسيق 24 ساعة).

inputs.label: Fasting Duration
inputs.businessContext: Number of consecutive hours to fast.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of consecutive hours to fast.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ardışık olarak oruç tutulacak saat sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der aufeinanderfolgenden Stunden des Fastens.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de horas consecutivas de ayuno.

inputs.label: Eating Window Duration
inputs.businessContext: Number of hours allowed for eating.

label_i18n.es: Duración de la ventana de alimentación

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of hours allowed for eating.

businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Stunden, die für das Essen erlaubt sind.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de horas permitidas para comer.

inputs.label: Target Daily Calories
inputs.businessContext: Total calories to consume during the eating window.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total calories to consume during the eating window.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yeme penceresi boyunca tüketilmesi gereken toplam kalori.

businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي السعرات الحرارية المراد استهلاكها خلال نافذة الأكل.

inputs.label: Current Weight
inputs.businessContext: Current body weight for additional context.
